repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1 panel catalogue has FWL/rank entries but no Honest-DiD cohort smoothness support-function threshold

published_prior_art.cite: rambachan2023parallel (https://doi.org/10.1093/restud/rdad018) + standard LP support-function duality; cohort aggregation lift not stated

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition: Markov event-window row-space phase transition, not aggregation quotient for Honest-DiD smoothness budgets

published_prior_art.cite: liu2025cohortanchored (https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.01829): shows aggregated robust inference can mislead and proposes block-bias restrictions, but not a necessary-and-sufficient active-face quotient certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_spectral_phase_transition: already banked a singular-value/rank-loss phase-transition template; this applies the motif to Honest-DiD aggregation

published_prior_art.cite: borusyak2024eventstudy (https://doi.org/10.1093/restud/rdae007) and rothsantanna2023efficient (https://doi.org/10.1086/726581): efficient aggregation estimands, not nonsmooth robustness-frontier rank loss

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the Liu/HonestDiD staggered-workflow gap is real but needs a generic-class obstruction tied to actual estimator maps, not only an active-face certificate, to carry flagship weight.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The statement says the sign of a 'relevant singular-value gap' determines Gamma-1, but the gap, threshold, and basis-invariant active-face inequalities are not explicitly defined.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The branch with r_n != 0 contradicts Assumption finite-supports: a zero-budget pre-calibrated direction with nonzero target action makes h_coh infinite, and the threshold convention does not define |hatpsi|/infinity.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Repair Conjecture 2 by splitting the zero-budget unbounded case from the finite-support case, or add an extended-real threshold convention and state the discontinuity in that topology.
Make chi_F basis-invariant: define the active-face inequalities, the exact singular-value gap, and the threshold whose sign classifies sharp, conservative, and anti-conservative regions.
Add a worked nondegenerate A, L, L_agg example from a Callaway-Sant'Anna, Sun-Abraham, or Wing stacked workflow showing an open conservative and anti-conservative region.

To reach flagship tier, tie the theorem to the actual HonestDiD staggered-timing workflow and prove a generic-class diagnostic that subsumes Liu-style block-bias warnings rather than merely comparing two solved supports.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjectures 1 and 2 for well-posedness, then add a concrete estimator-map example and a stronger flagship-tier gap over Liu/HonestDiD.
